name: StrangePool
short_description: You are trapped in a pool that looks familiar. Take a good look around and try to escape from the pool. This game is an anomaly search game. If you don't find any anomalies, proceed, and if you do find an anomaly, go back.
detailed_description:
You are trapped in a pool that looks familiar.

Take a good look around and try to escape from the pool.

This game is an anomaly search game.

If you don't find any anomalies, proceed, and if you do find anomalies, go back.

.

About this game

Inspired by the Exit 8 game, this is an Exit 8-like game.

It contains a light element of surprise.

There is a hint function to help you find anomalies.

About the hint function

Once the game is completed, the hint function will be released.

Using the hint function in the pool area may help you find anomalies.

Play time

We estimate 15 to 60 minutes.

Controls

Instructions[/h2

WASD - Move

E - Interact

Shift - Run

ESC - Setup

Space - Hint function (*released once the game is cleared)

Options

If the game is running too slow, please adjust the settings to lower the image quality, etc.

About play videos and distribution

You are welcome to play and distribute videos of games.

If possible, we would appreciate it if you could include a link to our store page in the video summary.

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support
